metadata.description: Buzzie AI plugins — Talkative peer network and Hawk business AI

plugins.name: talkative
plugins.description: Shadow a colleague's tools and onboard into MCP servers through natural conversation between Claude Code instances.

plugins.name: hawk
plugins.description: Connect Claude Code to Hawk — QuickBooks-powered AI for invoices, customers, and business data.

plugins.name: whatsapp
plugins.description: WhatsApp channel for Claude Code — receive messages and reply through your linked WhatsApp account using @buzzie-ai/whatsapp-channel (Baileys).
